headline: Here’s Why Polen Global Growth Strategy Sold Its Stake in Willis Towers Watson Public Limited Company (WTW)
summary: Polen Capital, an investment management company, released its fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter for “Polen Global Growth Strategy”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The fourth quarter of 2025 seemed to be like the entire year. The stock market experienced a severe 5% sell-off in the fourth quarter but quickly recovered to all-time […]
